title: Extending existing view
excerpt: Hi, is it possible to extend an existing view i Monday? We’re using the Kanban view and almost love it, but it has a few kinks we would like to iron out. Is that possible?

posts.author: jkohlin (Johan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, is it possible to extend an existing view i Monday? We’re using the Kanban view and almost love it, but it has a few kinks we would like to iron out. Is that possible?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t think that is possible. You can create your own Kanban view from scratch using the API but not extend the existing one
